zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith von Arnstein於大約1065年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 德根多福奧分格納斯奧時，她的父親Ludwig I. von Arnstein27歲，母親Guda van Zutphen26歲。她和Otto von Zutphen至少有2個女兒。她去世於1118年在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德享年54歲，埋葬在爾利瓦爾德費特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Arnstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from either of two places in northern Bavaria named Arnstein (‘eagle's crag’).

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith von Arnstein was born about 1065, in Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Ludwig I. von Arnstein, was 27 and her mother, Guda van Zutphen, was 26. She had at least 2 daughters with Otto von Zutphen. She died in 1118, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, at the age of 54, and was buried in Waldfeucht, Jülich.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith von Arnstein est née environ 1065, à Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Ludwig I. von Arnstein, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Guda van Zutphen, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Otto von Zutphen. Elle est décédée en 1118, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Waldfeucht, Jülich.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith von Arnstein um 1065 in Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ludwig I. von Arnstein 27 und ihre Mutter Guda van Zutphen 26. Sie hatte mit Otto von Zutphen mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1118 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande und wurde in Waldfeucht, Jülich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith von Arnstein è nata il circa 1065 nel Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Ludwig I. von Arnstein, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Guda van Zutphen, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Otto von Zutphen. Morì nel 1118, nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Waldfeucht, Jülich.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith von Arnsteinが約1065年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス デグジェンドルフオフエンバーグナッサウで生まれた時，父Ludwig I. von Arnsteinは27歳，母Guda van Zutphenは26歳であった。彼女はOtto von Zutphenとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1118年にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで54歳で死去し，ジuリチワルドフエウチトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Judith von Arnstein(이)가 대략 1065년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ludwig I. von Arnstein(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Guda van Zutphen(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Otto von Zutphen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1118년 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 ju리치 월드프우ch트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith von Arnstein nasceu aproximadamente 1065, em Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Ludwig I. von Arnstein, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Guda van Zutphen, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Otto von Zutphen. Ela faleceu em 1118, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Waldfeucht, Jülich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith von Arnstein родилась около 1065 г. в местности нассау, оффенбирг, ландкрис дегендорф, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Ludwig I. von Arnstein было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Guda van Zutphen, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Otto von Zutphen. Она умерла в 1118 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности валдфеучт, джuлич.
